mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`sms_auth` (phone_number, auth_code, is_verified, created_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{phoneNumber}, #{authCode}, false, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MINUTE)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE auth_code = #{authCode}, is_verified = false, created_at = NOW(), expires_at = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MINUTE)
mapper.select: SELECT `auth_code` FROM `bank`.`sms_auth` WHERE phone_number = #{phoneNumber} AND expires_at >= NOW()
SELECT is_verified FROM `bank`.`sms_auth` WHERE phone_number = #{phoneNumber} AND expires_at >= NOW()
